articles.title: @ClaudeDevs is now on X.
Research we co-authored on subliminal learningвҖ”how LLMs can pass on traits like preferences or misal...
articles.description:
Research we co-authored on subliminal learningвҖ”how LLMs can pass on traits like preferences or misalignment through hidden signals in dataвҖ”was published today in @Nature. 
Read the paper: nature.com/articles/s4158вҖҰ


Owain Evans@OwainEvans_UK

Our paper on Subliminal Learning was just published in Nature!
Last July we released our preprint. It showed that LLMs can transmit traits (e.g. liking owls) through data that is unrelated to that trait (numbers that appear meaningless).
WhatвҖҷs new?рҹ§ө

articles.title: VLM PerformanceпјҡQwen3.6 is natively multimodal, and Qwen3.6-35B-A3B showcases perception and multimo...
articles.description:
VLM PerformanceпјҡQwen3.6 is natively multimodal, and Qwen3.6-35B-A3B showcases perception and multimodal reasoning capabilities that far exceed what its size would suggest, with only around 3 billion activated parameters. Across most vision-language benchmarks, its performance matches Claude Sonnet 4.5, and even surpasses it on several tasks. Its strengths are particularly evident in spatial intelligence, where it achieves 92.0 on RefCOCO and 50.8 on ODInW13.
